insights.finding: Most common streak killer: sharp_drop (5/8 autopsies)
insights.actionable: Watch for sharp_drop as an early warning sign

insights.finding: Most common streak trajectory: steady (3/7 streaks)
insights.actionable: Streaks tend to maintain themselves once established

insights.finding: Peak satisfaction at 7 consecutive positive sessions (avg 9.20)
insights.actionable: Streaks of ~7 sessions represent the sweet spot

insights.finding: 3-session rolling avg predicts next residual sign with 80% accuracy (48/60)
insights.actionable: Momentum is real and somewhat predictable
